title: Lei Shuo's Blog
subTitle: Welcome to my personal blog
script: <script src='https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/view-image.js@2.0.0/view-image.min.js'></script><script async src='//busuanzi.ibruce.info/busuanzi/2.3/busuanzi.pure.mini.js'></script><script>document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',function(){var s=document.createElement('style');s.innerHTML='@keyframes fluid{0%{background-position:0% 50%}50%{background-position:100% 50%}100%{background-position:0% 50%}}html,body{background:linear-gradient(300deg,#ff4e50,#f9d423,#00c6ff,#0072ff)!important;background-size:400% 400%!important;animation:fluid 10s ease infinite!important;min-height:100vh!important;background-attachment:fixed!important}.markdown-body,.FileList,.side{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.9)!important;backdrop-filter:blur(8px);border-radius:10px;box-shadow:0 5px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.5)}.Header,.footer{background:transparent!important;border:none!important}#my-sidebar{position:fixed;left:15px;top:15px;bottom:15px;width:240px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.95);border-radius:12px;padding:15px;z-index:9999;box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);overflow-y:auto;display:flex;flex-direction:column;border:2px solid #fff}#search-bar{width:100%;padding:8px;margin-bottom:15px;border:1px solid #ccc;border-radius:6px}#my-sidebar a{text-decoration:none;color:#333;display:block;padding:8px;border-bottom:1px solid #eee;font-size:14px}#my-sidebar a:hover{background:#00c6ff;color:white;border-radius:4px}.label-title{font-weight:bold;margin-top:15px;margin-bottom:5px;color:#555;background:#eee;padding:4px;border-radius:4px}@media(min-width:1300px){.markdown-body{margin-left:260px}}@media(max-width:1299px){#my-sidebar{display:none}}';document.head.appendChild(s);window.ViewImage && ViewImage.init('.markdown-body img');fetch('/blogBase.json').then(r=>r.json()).then(d=>{var b=document.createElement('div');b.id='my-sidebar';var i=document.createElement('input');i.id='search-bar';i.placeholder='🔍 搜点什么...';i.oninput=function(e){var v=e.target.value.toLowerCase();b.querySelectorAll('.nav-link').forEach(l=>{l.style.display=l.innerText.toLowerCase().includes(v)?'block':'none'})};b.appendChild(i);var map={};Object.values(d).forEach(p=>{var l=p.labels[0]||'未分类';if(!map[l])map[l]=[];map[l].push(p)});Object.keys(map).sort().forEach(k=>{var t=document.createElement('div');t.className='label-title';t.innerText=k;b.appendChild(t);map[k].forEach(p=>{var a=document.createElement('a');a.className='nav-link';a.href=p.postUrl;a.innerText=p.postTitle;b.appendChild(a)})});document.body.appendChild(b)}).catch(e=>console.log(e));});</script>
